data.content: Implementation review rejected: acceptance behavior in buildLeaderboard matches the threshold spec, and src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts passes, but the required sanity gate 'bunx tsc --noEmit' currently fails with TS2344 in .next/types/validator.ts:394 for route '/api/test/terminal-fixture'.
